content: Ronnie Shaw: Ah, Cait. It's good to see you in one piece. Cait: It's an honor to serve under you, ma'am. Ronnie Shaw: No need for formality, soldier. Just be ready to earn my respect, not just hand it over because I've got a new rank. You understand? Cait: Loud and clear, ma'am. I respect you and everything you've done for the Minutemen. I just hope I can live up to your expectations. Ronnie Shaw: I can see you're eager, but you gotta be patient, kid. It took me years to get where I am. We'll need to prove ourselves to Preston and the others. Speaking of which, have you had any interactions with them lately? Cait: I met Preston a couple times. Seems like a good man, dedicated to his cause. And that Colonel Hollis... quite the character, wouldn't you say? Ronnie Shaw: Yes, Hollis has his moments. But let's focus on us.

Ronnie Shaw: Alright, let's get back to work. We've got a Commonwealth to rebuild, and I won't rest until it's safe for everyone. Cait: Understood, ma'am. I'll do whatever it takes to help you and the Minutemen. Ronnie Shaw: That's the spirit. Now let's get to it. We've got raiders to take down and settlements to defend.
